children.heading: Class I milk
children.label: 1 Class I milk
children.text: The term “Class I milk” means milk (including milk components) classified as Class I milk under a Federal milk marketing order.

children.heading: Eligible production
children.label: 2 Eligible production
children.text: The term “eligible production” means milk produced by a producer in a participating State.

children.heading: Federal milk marketing order
children.label: 3 Federal milk marketing order
children.text: The term “Federal milk marketing order” means an order issued under .section 608c of this title

children.heading: Participating State
children.label: 4 Participating State
children.text: The term “participating State” means each State.

children.label: A
children.text: shares in the risk of producing milk; and

children.label: B
children.text: makes contributions (including land, labor, management, equipment, or capital) to the dairy farming operation of the individual or entity that are at least commensurate with the share of the individual or entity of the proceeds of the operation.

children.heading: Payments
children.label: b Payments
children.text: The Secretary shall offer to enter into contracts with producers on a dairy farm located in a participating State under which the producers receive payments on eligible production.
the payment quantity for the producer during the applicable month established under subsection (d);

children.label: A
children.text: $16.94 per hundredweight; less

children.label: B
children.text: the Class I milk price per hundredweight in Boston under the applicable Federal milk marketing order; by

children.label: A
children.text: during the period beginning on the first day of the month the producers on a dairy farm enter into a contract under this section and ending on , 45 percent; andSeptember 30, 2005

children.label: B
children.text: during the period beginning on , and ending on , 34 percent.October 1, 2005September 30, 2007

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Subject to paragraph (2), the payment quantity for a producer during the applicable month under this section shall be equal to the quantity of eligible production marketed by the producer during the month.

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: 2 Limitation
children.text: The payment quantity for all producers on a single dairy operation during the months of the applicable fiscal year for which the producers receive payments under subsection (b) shall not exceed 2,400,000 pounds. For purposes of determining whether producers are producers on separate dairy operations or a single dairy operation, the Secretary shall apply the same standards as were applied in implementing the dairy program under section 805 of the Agriculture, Rural Development, Food and Drug Administration, and Related Agencies Appropriations Act, 2001 (as enacted into law by ; A–50).Public Law 106–387114 Stat. 1549

children.heading: Reconstitution
children.label: 3 Reconstitution
children.text: The Secretary shall promulgate regulations to ensure that a producer does not reconstitute a dairy operation for the sole purpose of receiving additional payments under this section.

children.heading: Payments
children.label: e Payments
children.text: A payment under a contract under this section shall be made on a monthly basis not later than 60 days after the last day of the month for which the payment is made.

children.heading: Signup
children.label: f Signup
children.text: The Secretary shall offer to enter into contracts under this section during the period beginning on the date that is 60 days after , and ending on .May 13, 2002September 30, 2007

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Except as provided in paragraph (2), any contract entered into by producers on a dairy farm under this section shall cover eligible production marketed by the producers on the dairy farm during the period starting with the first day of month the producers on the dairy farm enter into the contract and ending on .September 30, 2007

children.label: A
children.text: terminate the contract and allow the producer to retain any payments received under the contract; or

children.label: B
children.text: allow the contract to remain in effect and require the producer to repay a portion of the payments received under the contract based on the severity of the violation.
